Problem Statement: Use the following information to answer the next four exercises. A box is filled with several party favors. 12 (hats) + 15 (noisemakers) + 10 (finger traps) + 5 (confetti) = 42.

The event N (getting a noisemaker) has 15 favorable outcomes.  Therefore

     = 15 / 42
     = 5 / 14
     ≈ 0.3571 (about 35.7%).
